content.query:
SELECT
[_creative_id] as CreativeID
,[_account_id] as AccountID
,[_creative_name] as CreativeName
,[_call_to_action_type] as CallToActionType
,[_object_type] as ObjectType
,[post_type] as PostType
,[post_call_to_action_type] as PostCallToActionType
,[_title] as Title
,[_image_url] as ImageUrl
,[_thumbnail_url] as ThumbnailUrl
,[_status] as Status
,[post_id] as PostID
,[_instagram_actor_id] as InstagramActorId
,[_instagram_permalink_url] as InstagramPermalinkUrl
,[_effective_authorization_category] as EffectiveAuthorizationCategory
,[_body] as Body
,[_effective_instagram_story_id] as EffectiveInstagramStoryId
,[_effective_object_story_id] as EffectiveObjectStoryId
,[_instagram_user_id] as InstagramUserId
,[_effective_instagram_media_id] as EffectiveInstagramMediaId
,[_use_page_actor_override] as UsePageActorOverride
,[_image_hash] as ImageHash
,[_object_story_spec__page_id] as ObjectStorySpecPageId
,[_object_story_spec__instagram_actor_id] as ObjectStorySpecInstagramActorId
,[_object_story_spec__link_data__link] as ObjectStorySpecLinkDataLink
,[_object_story_spec__link_data__message] as ObjectStorySpecLinkDataMessage
,[_object_story_spec__link_data__name] as ObjectStorySpecLinkDataName

,[_object_story_spec__link_data__call_to_action__type] as ObjectStorySpecLinkDataCallToActionType

,[_object_story_spec__link_data__use_flexible_image_aspect_ratio] as ObjectStorySpecLinkDataUseFlexibleImageAspectRatio
,[_object_story_spec__link_data__caption] as ObjectStorySpecLinkDataCaption
,[_object_story_spec__link_data__attachment_style] as ObjectStorySpecLinkDataAttachmentStyle
,[_object_story_spec__link_data__child_attachments] as ObjectStorySpecLinkDataChildAttachments
,[_object_story_spec__link_data__multi_share_end_card] as ObjectStorySpecLinkDataMultiShareEndCard
,[_object_story_spec__link_data__multi_share_optimized] as ObjectStorySpecLinkDataMultiShareOptimized
,[_object_story_spec__link_data__description] as ObjectStorySpecLinkDataDescription
,[_object_story_spec__video_data__video_id] as ObjectStorySpecVideoDataVideoId
,[_object_story_spec__video_data__title] as ObjectStorySpecVideoDataTitle
,[_object_story_spec__video_data__message] as ObjectStorySpecVideoDataMessage
,[_object_story_spec__video_data__link_description] as ObjectStorySpecVideoDataLinkDescription
,[_object_story_spec__video_data__call_to_action__type] as ObjectStorySpecVideoDataCallToActionType
,[_object_story_spec__video_data__call_to_action__value__link] as ObjectStorySpecVideoDataCallToActionValueLink
,[_object_story_spec__video_data__call_to_action__value__link_format] as ObjectStorySpecVideoDataCallToActionValueLinkFormat
,[_object_story_spec__video_data__call_to_action__value__link_caption] as ObjectStorySpecVideoDataCallToActionValueLinkCaption
,[_object_story_spec__video_data__image_url] as ObjectStorySpecVideoDataImageUrl
,[_object_story_spec__video_data__image_hash] as ObjectStorySpecVideoDataImageHash
,[post_attachments_data] as PostAttachmentsData
,[post_call_to_action_value_link] as PostCallToActionValueLink
,[post_call_to_action_value_link_title] as PostCallToActionValueLinkTitle
,[post_call_to_action_value_link_format] as PostCallToActionValueLinkFormat
,[post_call_to_action_value_link_description] as PostCallToActionValueLinkDescription
,[post_call_to_action_value_link_caption] as PostCallToActionValueLinkCaption
,[post_call_to_action_value_page] as PostCallToActionValuePage
,[post_created_time] as PostCreatedTime
,[post_from_name] as PostFromName
,[post_from_id] as PostFromId
,[post_full_picture] as PostFullPicture
,[post_icon] as PostIcon
,[post_instagram_eligibility] as PostInstagramEligibility
,[_link] as Link
,[_authorization_category] as AuthorizationCategory
,[post_object_id] as PostObjectId
,[video_content_category] as VideoContentCategory
,[video_description] as VideoDescription
,[video_id] as VideoId
,[video_created_time] as VideoCreatedTime
,[_asset_feed_spec__images] as AssetFeedSpecImages
,[_asset_feed_spec__bodies] as AssetFeedSpecBodies
,[_asset_feed_spec__call_to_action_types] as AssetFeedSpecCallToActionTypes
,[_asset_feed_spec__descriptions] as AssetFeedSpecDescriptions
,[_asset_feed_spec__link_urls] as AssetFeedSpecLinkUrls
